scripts.build:scanner: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path build/scanner) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force build/scanner }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path build/scanner/scanner | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse src/scanner/* build/scanner/scanner/; Copy-Item -Recurse src/shared build/scanner/shared; Copy-Item package.json,package-lock.json build/scanner/; Set-Location build/scanner; npm install --production --omit=dev; Compress-Archive -Path * -DestinationPath ../scanner.zip -Force"
scripts.build:evaluator: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path build/evaluator) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force build/evaluator }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path build/evaluator/evaluator | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse src/evaluator/* build/evaluator/evaluator/; Copy-Item -Recurse src/shared build/evaluator/shared; Copy-Item package.json,package-lock.json build/evaluator/; Set-Location build/evaluator; npm install --production --omit=dev; Compress-Archive -Path * -DestinationPath ../evaluator.zip -Force"
scripts.build:api: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path build/api) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force build/api }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path build/api/api | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse src/api/* build/api/api/; Copy-Item -Recurse src/shared build/api/shared; Copy-Item package.json,package-lock.json build/api/; Set-Location build/api; npm install --production --omit=dev; Compress-Archive -Path * -DestinationPath ../api.zip -Force"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:scanner && npm run build:evaluator && npm run build:api && npm run build
